name: Cinnamon Spread
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Soft margarine at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ingredients and mix well.
2. Return to container and refrigerate, except when it is being used.
3. Each serving contains 1 fat exchange, 34 calories, 4 gm fat, and 47 mg sodium.
Note: This recipe has been sourced from "The New Diabetic Cookbook" by Mabel Cavaiani and shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier in October 1993.
